textPlain: What is “fake insurance?”What is a “shadow fleet?”Who decides on these terms?
> What is “fake insurance?”Do you believe Ro Marine would have paid out claims related to their "insured" vessels?

The second sentence of the article answers the fake insurance bit; "did not have permission to sell insurance but did it anyway".If you click the (helpfully underlined) first use of "shadow fleet" in the article it defines it for you.
You can literally press on it in the article and a definition pops up.
